briefdescription.para: Encode clock type, mclk bus, mclk mask bit, gclk pch and instance number, to clock subsystem.

listitem.para: 20..25 (6 bits): mclkbus following values MBUS_AHB (0) MBUS_APBA (1) MBUS_APBB (2) MBUS_APBC (3) MBUS_APBD (4)

26..31 (6 bits): type following values SUBSYS_TYPE_XOSC (0) SUBSYS_TYPE_DFLL (1) SUBSYS_TYPE_FDPLL (2) SUBSYS_TYPE_RTC (3) SUBSYS_TYPE_XOSC32K (4) SUBSYS_TYPE_GCLKGEN (5) SUBSYS_TYPE_GCLKPERIPH (6) SUBSYS_TYPE_MCLKCPU (7) SUBSYS_TYPE_MCLKPERIPH (8)

parameterdescription.para: select from the AHBx and the APBx buses
select the module connected to AHBx or APBx bus (0 to 31)
gclk peripheral channel number m in PCHTRLm (0 to 47)
instance number of the specified clock type

briefdescription.para: List clock subsystem IDs for sam_d5x_e5x family.

detaileddescription.para: Clock subsystem IDs. To be used in devicetree nodes, and as argument for clock API.
